originalTitle: ServiceNow’s stock soars to a historic month as AI fears fade across software
summary: ServiceNow shares gained over 40% this month, leading an industrywide relief rally among enterprise software companies.
content: ServiceNow shares gained over 40% this month, leading an industrywide relief rally among enterprise software companies.
chineseTitle: 随着软件界对 AI 的担忧逐渐消退，ServiceNow 股价飙升至历史性月份
chineseSummary: ServiceNow 股价本月上涨超过 40%，引领企业软件公司全行业的反弹。
chineseContent: ServiceNow 股价本月上涨超过 40%，引领企业软件公司全行业的反弹。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
